title: Water purification
abstract: Water purification is the process of removing undesirable chemicals, biological contaminants, suspended solids, and gases from water.
text:
Water purification is the process of removing contaminants from water.

## Boiling

Boiling can disinfect water by killing many pathogens. It does not remove chemical contaminants.

## Filtration

Filters remove particles and some microorganisms depending on pore size.

title: The Beatles
abstract: The Beatles were an English rock band formed in Liverpool in 1960.
text:
The Beatles were an English rock band.

## History

They became widely regarded as influential in popular music.

title: Hypothermia
abstract: Hypothermia is reduced body temperature that happens when a body dissipates more heat than it absorbs.
text:
Hypothermia is a dangerous drop in body temperature.

## Signs and symptoms

Shivering, confusion, and slow breathing can occur.

## Treatment

Move the person from cold exposure, remove wet clothing, and warm gradually.
